TExpress 1.1

Package index

All functions

TE_DEA()
Perform Differential Expression Analysis for Transposable Elements
TE_coords()
Add Genomic Coordinates to TE Count Data
TE_genomic_context()
Annotate TEs with Genomic Context Relative to Genes
annotate_TE_regions()
Annotate TEs with Genomic Regions and Generate Region Distribution Plots
call_deseq2()
Perform Differential Expression Analysis Using DESeq2
classify_TE_transcription()
Classify TE Transcription as Self-Expressed or Gene-Dependent
create_pie_donut()
Create Donut Pie Chart for Single TE Type
downloadTestData()
Download Test Data for Package Examples and Testing
graphTE_DEA()
Plot Differential Expression Analysis Results for Transposable Elements
graphTEregion()
Generate Genomic Region and TE Class Distribution Plots
graph_classify_TE()
Create Classification Plots for TE Expression
gtfBothStrands()
Create Antisense TE GTF with Both Strands
importGTF()
Import and Standardize GTF/GFF Annotation File
norm_counts()
Get Normalized Counts from DESeq2 Object
printDevice()
Save ggplot to Multiple File Formats
readTEcounts()
Read and Merge TE Count Data by Sample
read_metadata()
Read Metadata File with Sample Information
results_deseq2()
Get Results After DESeq2 Analysis
violinPlotByTEList()
Create violin plot for specific TE list
violinPlotByTEtype()
Create violin plot for specific TE type

Developed by Guillermo Peris.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
